name: Salmon-Asparagus Manicotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the manicotti according to package directions, drain and cool. Set aside.
2. Poach the salmon steak (in broth or water), let cool, remove skin and bones, and crumble the flesh into medium-small pieces.
3. Trim the bottoms of the asparagus and chop the green parts into 1/2"-1 inch pieces. You don't have to cook them beforehand.
4. Combine the cheese, salmon flakes, asparagus, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
5. Combine the cream of asparagus soup with 1 can of milk and add some of the resulting mixture to the cheese combination. The stuffing should be soft but not runny.
6. Use this stuffing to fill each tube of manicotti. Place them side-by-side in a shallow baking dish.
7. Pour the remaining soup over the pan and sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or so.
8. Serve with more steamed asparagus!
